text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet injures herself during training, so I
rush her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sorry about all the trouble...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine now, though. I can't waste the day lying
down like this.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Especially if I'm going to be number one! I have to
get back and train even harder!
choice_data_list: If you want to be number one, you need to rest.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Especially if I'm going to be number one! I have to
get back and train even harder!
choice_data_list: If you want to be number one, you need to rest.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I don't need your advice. I'm the patient here,
and I say I'm fine!
choice_data_list:
What's the point in training when you can't
perform at your best?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...You're right. There's no point in running when I
can't even stand upright.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What am I doing?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To be on the safe side, today's training
assignment is for Daiwa Scarlet to rest up.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe, exactly! I knew you'd get it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: All right, let's get back to it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Don't be so wishy-washy. I've got to push myself
if I want to be number one, don't I?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Come on, let's g―

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Argh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tries to force her way back into training but
ends up collapsing. In the end, it takes several
days for her to properly recover.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, if we're in agreement, then let's focus on
getting me healed up.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I suppose we should start with applying an ice...
pack...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Why are you looking at me like that? Was that
really such a weird thing to say?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I want to get back to training as soon as I can. If
I'm going to be number one, I can't neglect my
health.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. You should be! What else would you
expect from me?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're talking to the future number one
Umamusume, after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shortly after, Daiwa Scarlet returns to training
without incident.
